name: TerniEnergia S.p.A.
summary: TerniEnergia S.p.A. operates in the renewable energy sector, providing services related to solar energy, energy efficiency, and waste management. The company offers EPC (Engineering, Procurement, and Construction) services, O&M (Operation & Maintenance) services, and develops renewable energy plants. It is headquartered in Nera Montoro, Italy.
